edge_hypothesis: Stochastic K/D crossover in extreme oversold/overbought zones captures mean-reversion bounces during ranging markets. The critical insight from 60+ cycles of data: ranging regime showed PF 1.04 — the only naturally profitable regime for ema_rsi_atr outcomes. Yet every spec designed so far is a trend-following strategy that LOSES in ranging markets. This spec inverts the approach: trade ONLY when ADX < 20 (ranging), buy oversold K/D crosses below 15, sell overbought K/D crosses above 85. Tighter zones (15/85 vs default 20/80) ensure only extreme reversals are captured. Quick TP at Bollinger midband targets small, repeatable gains.
regime_assumption: Ranging markets only (ADX < 20). Invalidates during trending regimes where stochastic can stay overbought/oversold for extended periods. Expected to underperform when ADX > 25. This is explicitly designed as the complement to the supertrend_follow and macd_confirmation trend-following specs.

variants.name: stoch_ranging_reversal_tight
variants.description: Stochastic K/D crossover in extreme zones (15/85) with ADX < 20 ranging regime gate. Tight stops and quick TP target small, repeatable mean-reversion gains. ETH/1h for low drawdown.
entry_long: Require Stochastic K crosses above D on bar close.
Require ADX_14 < 20 to confirm ranging regime.
entry_short: Require Stochastic K crosses below D on bar close.
Require ADX_14 < 20 to confirm ranging regime.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: ADX_14 < 20 (ranging only — inverse of trend specs)
exit_rules: Exit on Stochastic K crossing back to neutral zone (40-60).
Exit on ADX_14 rising above 25 (regime shift to trending).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (10 bars — quick mean-reversion).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Ranging market breaks into trend while position open
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Stochastic stays extreme during sharp directional move
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 from entry (tight stop for mean-reversion).
Take profit at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.5:1 R:R, quick scalp).
Regime invalidation: exit if ADX_14 > 25 regardless of P&L.

components.notes: STOCHk/STOCHd crossover in extreme OS/OB zones as reversal signal
EMA context (baseline placeholder, not primary signal in mean-reversion mode)
ATR_14 for stop/TP sizing, ADX_14 < 20 as ranging regime filter

variants.name: stoch_ranging_wider_zones
variants.description: Stochastic reversal with standard 20/80 zones for more trade frequency. Tests whether relaxed zone boundaries still capture mean-reversion edge or dilute signal quality. Wider TP to let winners run slightly further.
entry_long: Require Stochastic K crosses above D on bar close.
Require ADX_14 < 20 to confirm ranging regime.
entry_short: Require Stochastic K crosses below D on bar close.
Require ADX_14 < 20 to confirm ranging regime.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on Stochastic K crossing back to neutral zone (40-60).
Exit on ADX_14 rising above 25 (regime shift to trending).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (12 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Ranging market breaks into trend while position open
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Double-dip oversold during extended drawdown
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.2x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.67:1 R:R).

components.notes: ATR_14 for stop/TP, ADX_14 < 20 ranging filter
